title: queued dispatch + depth bound
manager: Deterministic queued dispatch with a depth bound — events between machines are delivered through a FIFO queue in a defined order (document-order routes, write-order emissions, creation-order broadcast), bounded so a dispatch storm can't run away. The determinism is the whole point: same seed and stimuli, bit-identical run, even across hundreds of members, because delivery order is fixed rather than a race.
cs: deterministic FIFO queued dispatch (doc-order routes, write-order emissions, creation-order broadcast) + queue-depth bound (§22); the determinism guarantee for systems.
